description:
In this intense episode, Cesar Millan works with two dogs pushed to the brink by insecurity and past trauma. First, meet Rocky, a German Shepherd mix whose dangerous aggression toward men has left his owner, Jolene, terrified and exhausted. After a breakthrough leads to a sudden second charge, Cesar must bring Rocky to the Dog Psychology Center to rebuild his self-esteem through the power of the pack.  
Then, Cesar helps Kaitlyn and her dog, Leon. Adopted after the tragic passing of Kaitlyn’s be

title: Dog Attack at the Dog Psychology Center! | Cesar Millan’s Most Dangerous Dogs | Ep. 6
